title: Hogwarts Legacy

notes:
Running proton experimental and several winetricks/protontricks, I was able to make some progress on starting the game, but it always would crash or exit with an error before it would be playable.

First, the game would not exit with an error message, complaining about missing a C++ runtime.
After installing said runtime (vcrun2019) with protontricks, the error has changed to "Failed to initialize DirectX 12."

I have made some attempts bypassing this, however, none have properly worked.
Assuming DirectX to not work because of missing modification, I've installed mdx through protontricks aswell. This causes the game to still crash with the same error.

Adding the otherwise common PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command% launch option just makes the game not launch, even though it's still counted as running in Steam. It has to be stopped through Steam, too - doesn't show up in the process list as far as I can tell.

Additionally, using protontricks, I changed the Windows environment it was supposed to simulate to Windows 10. That finally got me to flash a window that was likely the game window - unfortunately, that window crashes almost immediately.
title: Hogwarts Legacy

notes:
I have a 1080ti. This is the oldest graphics card anyone as of this writing has documented trying to play the game with on here. It doesn't work. All I ever get is an error dialog saying "Failed to initialize DirectX 12. Graphics drivers may require an update, or graphics adapter may not be supported". 

I tried Proton Exeperimental, Proton 7.0-6, Glorious Eggroll 7-49, I tried the DLSS trick, I tried every combination of launch parameters anyone has ever reported trying, I tried nvidia driver 515 and nvidia driver 525. I tried running it without waiting for vuklan shaders to finish. I tried running it and waiting for vulkan shaders to finish.

I tried the suggestions listed here as well as the many suggestions on forums, I tried various proton versions, and double checked that everything was up to date, but it still won't launch. The game will get to the epilepsy warning and then crash. Some earlier posts were hoping that with the 6.2 kernel and/or Mesa 23 would help but they do not. I am using the latest 6.6 kernel as well as Mesa 23.2 and it still isn't working. I have already asked for a refund but I'm hoping that they will get a fix eventually
